title: trifolium eriocephalum subsp. villiferum
intro: Trifolium eriocephalum subsp. villiferum, also known as the annual clover or woolly-headed clover, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trifolium eriocephalum subsp. villiferum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
